steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select '0801.210407 company to bend Fraud Control' company using filter
Select 'Business unit 0801.210407' business unit using filter
Hover over Edit Control icon to get Tooltip
Verify that Edit icon Tooltip is presented on Control table
Hover over Activate Control icon to get Tooltip
Verify that Activate icon Tooltip is presented on Control table
